prevalence.trend: increasing with aging and cancer burden

burden.dalyPerCapita: moderate; risk of PE and post-thrombotic syndrome

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Wells score assessment, D-dimer when appropriate, confirmation by venous duplex ultrasound

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Variable; depends on timely diagnosis and anticoagulation access

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Ultrasound access better in urban centers; delays in rural areas
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Heparin/LMWH then DOACs or warfarin; compression therapy
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Uneven access to D-dimer/ultrasound and long-term anticoagulation follow-up
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: SUS provides inpatient anticoagulation and expanding DOAC availability
